# shapes

**Instance Property**

An array of shapes that collectively define the audio-emitting surface area of a volumetric source.

## Declaration

```swift
var shapes: [PHASEShape] { get }
```

## Discussion

The framework sets the contents to the `shapes` argument of the [doc://com.apple.phase/documentation/PHASE/PHASESource/init(engine:shapes:)] initializer.
title: shapes
